calendar.matters:
Petition To Approve Settlement Of Estate Without An Accounting, For Allowance Of Attorney Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs By Placement Of A Lien On The Real Property And For Final Distribution Of The Decedents Estate
Off Calendar Jul-11-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sanford Margolin for Petitioner.

Mr. Sanford stated that the creditor's claims were given notice of the first probate, that no one has filed a law suit and the claims are barred, that the costs incurred for the second probate were at the request and consent of his Client, that he was not aware of the first probate, but she was and that it would be unfair for his office to absorb the costs. Mr. Margolin also stated that this is being done at the insistence of the petitioner so that she is not compelled to have to sell the house, that there is no cash in the estate, spoke of a past medical issue his Client had and stated that she is fine now. The First and Final Report on Waiver of Account, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Approve Settlement Of Estate Without An Accounting, For Allowance Of Attorney Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs By Placement Of A Lien On The Real Property And For Final Distribution Of The Decedents Estate
